creator: bmah@FreeBSD.org
text:
I concur, this looks like a temporary problem in the package building infrastructure that affected other package builds as well. I've been looking (unsuccesfully so far) to try to figure out if that issue has been resolved or not.

However, I'm able to build an iperf-3.9 package locally on a 13.0-RELEASE/amd64 dev VM, and some cursory testing of the iperf3 mainline also seems to work.
